text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen is here. Sakura Chiyono O
and I have been training as hard as we possibly
can without overstraining her body.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've memorized everything I learned during
training up till today!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, just you watch! I'm going to aim for first
today too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O is trying to act like her usual
self, the way she was before admitting her worries
about being past her peak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But even if it is just an act to hide how she really
feels, if she wants me to act like normal, then all I
can do is honor her wishes.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! Heh. It never really feels like the race is
about to start until you wish me good luck.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
We've done everything we could for the
Takarazuka Kinen, and I'm going to show you just
how much our hard work has paid off.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking, you see. Even if it's true that
my peak really has passed...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
As long as I keep looking forward and working
hard, I'll still be able to accomplish plenty of
things!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I have no intention of losing to anyone
today, no matter who I'm racing against!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The spring Grand Prix, the Takarazuka Kinen is
here, and so are the dashing Umamusume who are
going to run in it!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But who among them will claim glory today? Hold
on tight, folks, because the race is about to start!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Yaeno... She must be even stronger than she was
during the Classics.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Bamboo has grown by leaps and bounds too.
There's no doubt just how powerful her running
will be today.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Inari's been attracting lots of attention since the
beginning of the year, which means her abilities
must be the real deal...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...It's okay. I'm going to be okay!
